name: Oysters and Artichoke Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook artichoke hearts as directed on package.
2. Place in a flat, buttered casserole and cover with sauteed mushrooms.
3. Cook oysters in their liquid until edges begin to curl. Drain thoroughly in a collander, reserving the liquid.
4. Melt butter and saute onion until tender; add parsley and cook for a minute.
5. Add flour, stirring until smooth.
6. Add enough white wine to oyster liquid to make 1 1/2 cups. Add seasonings and stir constantly until thick.
7. Add oysters and spoon the mixture over artichokes and mushrooms. Arrange lemon slices over top; add a dash or two of paprika and cayenne pepper.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes, or until bubbling.
